consumer.use_item_timestamp.description: true to use the item timestamp, false for the received timestamp

consumer.log_duplicates.description: true to emit a tracing log each time a duplicate trace item is detected in the accepted-outcomes aggregator

consumer.blq_enabled_2.description: enable backlog queue for the specified consumer group

consumer.blq_stale_threshold_seconds.description: BLQ stale threshold in seconds. Messages older than this are routed to the backlog queue.
